name: Life Twin Insight Agent
description: An explainable AI agent that transforms sleep, energy, focus, stress, and habit-loop questions into SMILE-based digital twin optimization insights.
author: Shourya Solanki
input_examples: Why do I crash every afternoon?
How can I improve my sleep-workout-focus loop?
What habits are reducing my productivity?
output_style: Explainable optimization report with explicit source provenance
